exam_name: CMA Exam Part 2 – Strategic Financial Management
exam_price_notes: IMA member price $311. Non-member price $415. Both parts must be passed within 3 years.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Prometric authorized test centers globally

id_requirements: One government-issued photo ID with your name, signature, and photograph. A second form of ID bearing your name and signature is recommended.
exam_rules: Closed-book for MCQ section. Essays are open-book (access to a dictionary allowed). On-screen calculator provided. No personal calculators permitted. Scratch paper provided. Essays graded holistically by IMA-trained graders.
renewal_options: Maintain active IMA membership and complete 30 hours of CPE per year (including 2 hours of ethics). Report CPE through IMA's online system.

prerequisites.description: Same experience requirements as Part 1; both parts must be passed within 3 years of each other

retake_policy.notes: CMA exam offered during three testing windows per year: January/February, May/June, September/October. Both parts must be completed within 3 years of enrollment.

official_study_resources.title: IMA CMA Learning System
official_study_resources.notes: Official comprehensive study materials and practice tests

aliases: cma exam part 2 strategic financial management
